The company will build the spacecraft, provide its Terran R rocket, and fly the […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> MIT built a memory system that lets robots remember where you left your keys https://thenextweb.com/news/mit-daaam-robot-long-term-memory-objects Thu, 18 Jun 2026 11:44:19 +0000 TheNextWeb=4d7379ed1d84e61739ac03dde51e513d Robots are still surprisingly bad at remembering where things are. MIT researchers built a system called DAAAM to fix that. DAAAM stands for Describe Anything, […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Attackers cracked 75,000 Fortinet firewalls with old passwords, not a zero-day https://thenextweb.com/news/fortibleed-fortinet-firewall-credentials-leak Thu, 18 Jun 2026 11:36:13 +0000 TheNextWeb=3ad78f5d2d2ed42c31b5baa105864947 Security researchers have uncovered a sprawling cache of stolen credentials for Fortinet firewalls, exposing login details for tens of thousands of organisations around the world. The dataset, dubbed “FortiBleed,” contains plaintext usernames, emails and passwords for 73,932 unique Fortinet FortiGate firewall and VPN devices across 194 countries, touching more than 21,000 domains. In an interview with Politico, Energy Commissioner Dan Jørgensen said companies must demonstrate commitment to the EU’s energy, climate, and environmental goals if they want to build data centres on the continent.
